The collection

Everything is made to order. Tap any photo to see it larger.

कृति — made by hand, for the pooja ghar

ArtKrruti is a small stitching studio. Every thaal cover is pleated by hand, every toran is cut and finished individually, and the fabric is real Paithani, khan and brocade — not printed imitation.

Tell us the colour of your mandir, the size of your thaali or door, and the festival you're preparing for. We'll match it. Orders for mandals, housing societies and wedding return gifts are taken in bulk with a discount.

Delivery across India · Made to order in 3–10 days

We show our work at exhibitions across Mumbai — most recently the Mahila Anand Melava in Borivali. Come see the fabric in person if you're nearby.

Ganesh ChaturthiThaal covers, asans, torans
Gudi PadwaGudi flags & ready sarees
Diwali & Lakshmi PoojaDoor torans, chowki sets
Weddings & HaldiShagun cones, potlis

Talk to us

Custom colours, bulk orders, or you're not sure what size you need — just message us.

  • 💬 WhatsApp +91 98211 08371
  • 🕑 Reply time Usually within a few hours, Mon–Sat
  • 📍 Based in Mumbai · ships across India
  • 📦 Bulk orders 25 pieces and above, discounted

Want something in your own colour?

Send us a photo of your mandir, thaali or door, along with the measurement. We'll suggest fabric and share a price before you commit.
